versions.version_description: This version includes a more chords to highlight the melody more and add more dramatic color to the song.
Ab Version in the realm of Brenda Lee Original w/ a Partridge Family Twist for Christmas Show by Misti Koop. Tab by Joseph Vincent McCauley.
Easy Tab with only three chords (tonic, subdominant, dominant).
Fairly simplified but still difficult version that is easy to play with the begging ridd.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: Found no perfect version of the song. So hear here a updated version.

recommended.song_name: Santa Claus Is Coming To Town

content:
Hello, this is one of my first tabs (i've figured out about 3 before this!), so go 
easy on me. This is 100% correct! ... as far as I know anyway!

Message me with mistakes!
Username: Fieryhead

--------------------------------------
For those who don't know strumming:

Rhythm: Coff - ee     Tea             Coff - ee     Tea    
Strum:  Down   Up     Down            Down   Up     Down
Lyrics: Rock - in      a        -       round       the

Rhythm: Tea           Coff - ee       Tea           Coff - ee
Strum:  Up            Down   Up       Down          Up     Down
Lyrics: Christ  -        mas          tree         at     the

Rhythm: Coff - ee     Tea             Co - ca -     Co - la
Strum:  Up     Down   Up              Down Up       Down Up
Lyrics:   Christ   -  mas             Par - ty         hop

Rhythm: Tea           Coff - ee       Coff - ee     Tea
Strum:  Down          Up     Down     Up     Down    Up
Lyrics                 [Interlude]

(Repeat!)

--------------------------------------
Tuning: Standard (EADGBe)
Capo:   No Capo

[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]C6[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]C6[/ch]
Rock - in' a - round the Christ - mas Tree [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G7[/ch]      
at the Christ - mas par - t y hop [/tab]
[tab][ch]G2[/ch]              [ch]G7[/ch]         [ch]G2[/ch]     [ch]G7[/ch]
Mis - tle - toe hung where you can see [/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C[/ch]
Ev - 'ry cou - ple tries to stop. [/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
You will get a sen - ti - men - tal feel - ing [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Am(maj7)[/ch]
When you hear voic - es sing - ing, [/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am7[/ch]                [ch]D7[/ch]                  [ch]G7[/ch]
"Let's be jol - ly; Deck the halls with boughs of hol - ly" [/tab]

[tab] [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]C6[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]C6[/ch]
Rock-in' a - round the Christ - mas Tree[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G7[/ch]           
Have a hap - py hol - li - day[/tab]
[tab][ch]G2[/ch]             [ch]G7[/ch]         [ch]G2[/ch]         [ch]G7[/ch] 
Ev - 'ry - one danc - ing mer - ri - ly [/tab]
[tab][ch]G7[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]    [ch]G7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
In a new old - fash - ioned way [/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]C6[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]C6[/ch]
Rock - in' a - round the Christ - mas Tree [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G7[/ch]      
let the Christ - mas spir - it ring.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G2[/ch]             [ch]G7[/ch]        [ch]G2[/ch]        [ch]G7[/ch]
Lat - er we'll have some pun - kin pie[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]C[/ch] 
And we'll do some car - ol - ing.[/tab]

You will get a sen - ti - men - tal feel - ing [/tab]
